state.tooLoud: Too loud, play softer or move back
state.tooQuiet: Too quiet, play louder or move closer

error.noDevices: No microphone was found. Connect one and refresh the device list.
error.deviceGone: That microphone is no longer connected.
error.deviceLost: The microphone stopped responding and the tuner was stopped.
error.fileUnreadable: That recording could not be read. It must be a WAV file.
error.invalidA4: The reference pitch must be between 430 and 450 Hz.
error.invalidReedCount: The tuner resolves one to three reeds per note.
error.invalidNote: That note is outside the range the tuner tracks.
error.invalidTranspose: Transposition is limited to two octaves either way.
error.playbackFailed: The reference tone could not be played.
error.unexpected: Something went wrong. See the log for details.

freeze.hint: Hold the reading on screen while the note keeps sounding (H)

spectrum.title: Spectrum
spectrum.label: The frequency spectrum of the tracked note

ruler.title: Deviation
ruler.label: The deviation of each reed, in cents

notes.title: Notes
notes.label: The notes E0 to C9. Click one to pin it.

sounds.hint: Note sounds: hold a note on the strip to hear it

register.hint: The register you have pulled. It sets how many reeds the tuner listens for, and which rank each reading belongs to.
register.lockedPlaying: Stop playback to change the register.

side.hint: Which keyboard the bench faces. The bass side tunes the whole octave ladder at once.

bassRegister.hint: The bass switch you have pulled; a fixed machine always sounds every voice.
